text:
The local authority must deliver this order and a statement of service to [police force] as soon as is practicable.

This exclusion requirement having been made [without notice to [name of excluded person]] [at a hearing at which [name of excluded person] has not attended], the court will consider whether the order should be varied or discharged at a hearing at the Family Court sitting at [court name] on [date] at [time] allowing [number] hours.

[Name of excluded person] has the right to apply to the court at any time to vary or discharge this exclusion requirement.

Experts

The application by [name] for permission to instruct [name of expert] is adjourned pending compliance with Part 25C Family Procedure Rules 2010. Upon compliance the court will consider the application [at a hearing to be listed] / [on paper].

[Name(s)/party/ies] [is] / [are] given permission to instruct [name of expert], [insert discipline], as a single joint expert to assess [names of people being assessed including specifying any children]. The report of the expert shall be filed at court and served on the parties by 4.00pm on [date]. Directions for implementation of this expert instruction are contained in the schedule to this order. The cost of such report shall be paid by the parties equally.

Permission is given to [name] to instruct the following experts as single joint experts:

[Name of expert], [insert discipline] to assess [names of people being assessed including specifying any children], whose report shall be filed at court and served on the parties by 4.00pm on [date].

[etc.].

Directions for implementation of these expert instructions are contained in the schedule to this order. The cost of such report shall be paid by the parties equally.

Unless the experts are agreed there shall be an expert’s discussion to be arranged by the solicitor for the child[ren] which must occur not later than [date not later than 15 business days after the reports have been filed and served]:

The draft agenda for the expert’s discussion shall be circulated by the child[ren]’s solicitor not less than 5 working days prior to the meeting, which shall be agreed by the parties and sent to the expert not less than 2 working days before the discussion.

The discussion shall be chaired by [the child[ren]’s solicitor] / [name].
